channel.title: ShadowFetch News
channel.description: Late-breaking headlines across every beat — aggregated, organized, and brief-first.

item.title: Source: Mets add Pham on minors deal for depth
item.description: The Mets added to their depth on Opening Day, reaching a minor league deal with veteran outfielder Tommy Pham, a source told ESPN.
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Fried's gem lifts Yanks despite Judge's 4-K opener
item.description: Max Fried allowed just two hits in 6⅓ scoreless innings, and the Yankees cruised past the Giants 7-0 on Wednesday night despite Aaron Judge's first career hitless Opening Day.
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Padres' Darvish to restricted list amid elbow rehab
item.description: Pitcher Yu Darvish was placed on the restricted list Wednesday as he spends the 2026 season recovering from elbow surgery, a decision that could free up significant payroll spac...
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Impact of overturned ABS calls worries ex-ump
item.description: Former MLB umpire Richie Garcia is worried about the impact that robot umpires will have on their human counterparts.
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Yanks' Cole to start season on 15-day IL, not 60
item.description: Yankees ace Gerrit Cole was placed on the 15-day injured list before Wednesday's season opener against San Francisco rather than the 60-day IL.
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Phils' Crawford, son of ex-major leaguer, to start
item.description: Rookie Justin Crawford, the son of ex-major leaguer Carl Crawford, will be the starting center fielder for the Philadelphia Phillies as this season gets underway.
item.author: ESPN MLB

item.title: Everything you need for Opening Day: What we're watching, lineups and updates from every game
item.description: Baseball is back! Here's your one-stop shop for all of the season-opening action.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Sens' Chabot (broken arm) could miss 2 months
item.description: Senators defenseman Thomas Chabot will miss up to two months with a broken arm, coach Travis Green announced on Thursday.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: World Series of Poker returning to ESPN in July
item.description: The World Series of Poker is returning to ESPN for the first time since 2021, with coverage of this year's main event from Las Vegas beginning July 2.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Quad God rebounds from Olympics, leads worlds
item.description: Ilia Malinin bounced back from misfiring at the Milan Cortina Olympics by leading after the short program at the figure skating world championships.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Brewers star OF Chourio set to miss 2-4 weeks
item.description: The Brewers placed star outfielder Chourio on the 10-day injured list on Thursday because of a fractured left hand. The move was made retroactive to Wednesday.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Brady on comeback: NFL didn't 'like that idea'
item.description: Tom Brady says he explored the possibility of coming out of retirement and returning to the NFL, adding that the league did not "like that idea very much."
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: LSU works to lure Wade back as it fires McMahon
item.description: LSU is working to finalize a deal to bring back Will Wade, the current coach at NC State, who was suspended for the 2019 NCAA tournament while at LSU and later fired amid an NCA...
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: QB Simpson says he's 'absolutely' 1st-round pick
item.description: Ty Simpson felt like he made a final impression at Alabama's pro day in front of NFL scouts. He believes he's 'absolutely' a lock to be a first-round pick.
item.author: ESPN Headlines

item.title: Federal Reserve urges judge to deny bid to revive Jerome Powell probe subpoenas
item.description: President Donald Trump, in his latest jibe at Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, called him a "moron,' and blasted him over keeping interest rates too high.
item.author: CNBC Top

item.title: Major outgoing CEOs are citing AI as a factor in their decisions to step down
item.description: Coca-Cola CEO James Quincey and former Walmart CEO Doug McMillon have told CNBC that the next wave of artificial intelligence is a reason for their departures.
item.author: CNBC Top

item.title: Minnesota elections office subpoenaed in probe over state voter rolls, sources say
item.description: The Minnesota Secretary of State's Office has been ordered to turn over certain voter records.
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Trump slams Starmer's reaction to Iran war and questions U.K. alliance
item.description: During a Cabinet meeting at the White House, President Trump reacted to British Prime Minister Keir Starmer's reluctance to get involved in the Iran war. This comes as Mr. Trump...
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: 2 charged in connection with alleged explosive device at MacDill Air Force Base: FBI
item.description: An alleged improvised explosive device was found near the visitors center at MacDill Air Force Base in Florida last week.
item.author: ABC News Top Stories

item.title: Hegseth says he welcomes deal with Iran, but Pentagon will keep ‘negotiating with bombs’
item.description: Pete Hegseth said he welcomes a U.S.-led negotiated peace deal with Iran, after President Trump indicated earlier this week the defense secretary was “disappointed” by the idea,...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: United Airlines, flight attendants reach labor deal for first raises since pandemic
item.description: United Airlines and its flight attendants union reached a new labor deal.
item.author: CNBC Top

item.title: Trump housing chief seeks new criminal probe into Letitia James
item.description: Bill Pulte, director of the Federal Housing Finance Agency, is seeking a new criminal probe into New York Attorney General Letitia James (D) after failing to convict her on mort...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: These 10 top-rated stocks are crushing the S&P 500 — yet the media and Wall Street ignore them
item.description: Stocks with little coverage tend to outperform well-known and widely followed peers.
item.author: MarketWatch

item.title: Top Senate Dems blast proposed ACA rule promoting ‘junk coverage’ that would push estimated 2 million off enrollment
item.description: A trio of top Senate Democrats led their colleagues in condemning a proposed rule by the Trump administration that would lift restrictions on the number of non-standardized plan...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: Watch live: House Ethics panel examines Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick FEMA fraud allegations
item.description: The House Ethics Committee on Thursday afternoon will look into allegations against Rep. Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick (D-Fla.), who is accused of stealing $5 million from the Fede...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: The essential ingredients for a winning Democratic midterm message
item.description: Donald Trump's low job ratings and personal scores, combined with his broken promises to reduce prices, provide a strong foundation for a winning Democratic midterm message.
item.author: The Hill

item.title: Trump says Iran let 10 oil ships through Strait of Hormuz as 'present' to U.S.
item.description: Trump said the U.S has "very substantial talks going on with respect to Iran," though Tehran has denied direct talks have taken place.
item.author: CNBC Top

item.title: Senate GOP sends Democrats "last and final" offer to end DHS shutdown
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune said Republicans have submitted what their "last and final" offer to end the DHS shutdown. Follow live updates.
item.author: CBS News Latest

item.title: Investors are snubbing Trump’s Iran pause. Even his Truth Social posts may not save the market.
item.description: Trump hoped his Iran reprieve would bring a stock-market miracle — but investors aren’t buying and time is short.
item.author: MarketWatch

item.title: Harris books appearances in the South next month: CNN
item.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris will appear at multiple state Democratic Party fundraisers across the South next month, CNN reported Thursday. Harris will reportedly appear...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: Mace to Trump: ‘Take Lindsey Graham out of the Situation Room’
item.description: Rep. Nancy Mace (R-S.C.) issued an indirect plea to President Trump on Wednesday to stop Sen. Lindsey Graham (R-S.C.) from advising on the conflict with Iran, as the senator pre...
item.author: The Hill

item.title: The best deals we’ve found from Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (so far)
item.description: Amazon loves to manufacture an event. March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale, which starts today and runs through March...
item.author: The Verge

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump renews Iran threats, urges deal 'before it is too late'
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
item.author: ABC News Top Stories

item.title: Details revealed of Board of Peace plan for Gaza disarmament
item.description: Plan, submitted by Board of Peace head Nikolay Mladenov, calls for gradual disarmament over eight months.
item.author: Al Jazeera

item.title: Bitcoin trades narrow corridor as macro pressures throttle liquidity ahead of potential breakout: analysts
item.description: Bitcoin is holding near $70,000 as analysts flag $72,000K as a key breakout zone and note a mix of macro pressures and tight liquidity.
item.author: The Block

item.title: Trump to Congress: End DHS shutdown or face 'very drastic measures'
item.description: Lawmakers are stalled on funding the Department of Homeland Security as airport delays mount.
item.author: CNBC Top

item.title: Dash Crofts, of 1970s music duo Seals & Crofts, dead at 85
item.description: Seals & Crofts chart hits included "Summer Breeze," "Get Closer," "Diamond Girl" and more.
item.author: ABC News Top Stories

item.title: Govee’s color-changing smart lamps are on sale for up to 30 percent off
item.description: Speaking from experience, better lighting can completely change how a space feels. Over the years, I’ve filled my apartment with Govee’s color-changing lights, and they’ve made...
item.author: The Verge

item.title: ‘It feels slimy’: My friend offered to be my adviser, but didn’t tell me he’s paid to push financial products. Can I trust him?
item.description: “His revenue sharing, which he did not disclose, creates conflicts of interest as advisers may be incentivized to recommend funds that pay them more.
item.author: MarketWatch

item.title: Nicolás Maduro appears again in New York court on ‘narco-terrorism’ charges
item.description: Deposed Venezuelan president and his wife, who both pleaded not guilty, were captured by US military in January The deposed Venezuelan president Nicolás Maduro again appeared in...
item.author: The Guardian World
